# Feature: [Feature Name]

## 1. Overview

Brief description of the feature and which PRD requirement(s) it addresses (e.g., REQ-1, REQ-3).

## 2. User Stories

As a [user type], I want to [do something], so that [benefit].
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Given [context], when [action], then [outcome].

## 3. Functional Requirements

- [FR-1] What the feature must do
- [FR-2] Another functional requirement

## 4. Non-Functional Requirements

- Performance, accessibility, or UX expectations (no technical implementation details)

## 5. Dependencies

- Other features or business prerequisites this feature depends on

## 6. Assumptions & Constraints

- [Assumption 1]
- [Constraint 1]

## 7. Open Questions

- [ ] [Unresolved question or decision needed from stakeholders]

## 8. Release Criteria

- **Feature flag**: [Flag name, if progressive delivery is used]
- **Rollout strategy**: [All users / percentage rollout / opt-in]
- **Rollback plan**: [How to disable the feature if issues arise]
